name: Chocolate Syrup Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FROSTING----------------------------------
2 tbsp Butter; softened
1 oz Unsweetened chocolate, melted
1 c Powdered sugar
1/8 c Coffee
1/4 tsp Vanilla
2 tbsp Marshmallow fluff
Cream butter and sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well until mixed.
Alternately add syrup and flour into the creamed mixture and blend until smooth.
Add vanilla. Pour into greased angel food pan and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
Frosting: Mix all ingredients until smooth and spread on cooled cake.
